subject: Excel keeps crashing on startup
description: Excel crashes every time the user opens it. No error message displayed.

subject: Cannot connect to VPN from home
description: User unable to connect to corporate VPN. Cisco AnyConnect error code 429.

subject: Locked out of Active Directory account
description: User locked out after 5 failed login attempts. Needs immediate unlock for client call.
resolution: Unlocked AD account and reset password. Advised user on password policy.

subject: Printer not showing in device list
description: HP LaserJet disappeared from devices after Windows Update.

subject: Laptop battery draining very fast
description: Battery goes from 100% to 20% in under 2 hours. Laptop is 18 months old.
